case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (U.S.A.) N.A. VS. STEPHEN R EBINGER ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-17-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-17-2020 CONTINUED TO AUG-11-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $395.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 200012991) AS TO DEFENDANT EBINGER, STEPHEN R

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (U.S.A.) N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-11-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
